data.title: Secret Jouju: Byeorui Yeosin
data.synopsis: Jouju, the daughter of a famous pattisier in Sunshineville. One day, she meets a mysterious cat Taro and learns that she is the Goddess of the Stars, who made a big mistake in the heavenly kingdom and was reborn on Earth as a human. Now she needs to find the 11 Goddesses of the stars and save the Heavenly Kingdom.

data.synopsis: Mia, a cute and passionate gamer girl recently ended her relationship with her boyfriend due to the lack of intimacy in their sex life. Feeling unsatisfied and frustrated, Mia opens up about her situation to her close gaming friend, who is also dealing with his own romantic frustrations. What starts as a simple, honest conversation between two friends soon takes an unexpected and steamy turn, as both Mia and her gaming buddy explore desires they've been suppressing.

titles.title: Balala Xiao Mo Xian: Yao Xing Shouhu Zhe
巴啦啦小魔仙曜星守护者1
Balala the Fairies: Radiant Star Guardians

data.title: Balala Xiao Mo Xian: Yao Xing Shouhu Zhe
data.title_english: Balala the Fairies: Radiant Star Guardians
data.title_japanese: 巴啦啦小魔仙曜星守护者1
data.synopsis:
The Fairies Laura Xia, Cora Yan and Sylvia Bai and Symin, felt the change in magic energy and boarded the Star Dream Moon Boat to enter the newly opened Fantasy Night Realm.

In defending the Fantasy Night Realm against the dark forces controlled by Nightfall, the fairies were recognized by the Radiant Stars and made the new Guardians of the Radiant Stars.

They passed the trial awakening the power of the Radiant Stars, and forged friendship with Aiden and Connie as well. Together they fought against Nightfall, but they didn't expect to fall into his trap, accidentally lifting the seal and releasing him. The Fantasy Night Realm is about to face a greater crisis...

(Source: Balala the Fairies Wiki)

data.title: Caihong Huwei Dui
data.synopsis:
The Rainbow Crew consists of four girls; Rainbow, the captain, a smart and kind rabbit, Tali, a brave horse, Nelly, a gentle sheep and Aurora, a fiery hamster. Together they resolve crises in their town by turning negativity into positivity.

(Source: Meta Media)

titles.title: Even a Replica Falls in Love
レプリカだって、恋をする。
Even a Replica Can Fall in Love

data.title: Replica datte, Koi wo Suru.
data.title_english: Even a Replica Can Fall in Love
data.title_japanese: レプリカだって、恋をする。
title_synonyms: Even a Replica Falls in Love
data.synopsis:
On days when Sunao is sick, or not feeling like going to school, she is called to take her place. She was born to this world when Sunao wished to have a substitute. No one knows that she exists, but she tries to do her best for Sunao whenever she is called. One day she talks with Sanada, one of her classmates. They become friends, but soon he notices that she is different from the original Sunao...he was the first one who did. She tells him to talk with her only when she has her hair half-up. Sanada does like she told him, and they enjoy their time together. As they become closer, she realizes that she has special feelings toward Sanada. But she doesn't know what will happen to her...if she, a replica, falls in love.

(Source: Kadokawa)

titles.title: とある暗部の少女共棲

data.title: Toaru Anbu no Item
data.title_japanese: とある暗部の少女共棲
data.synopsis:
In Academy City, where supernatural abilities are part of everyday science, the city's peace is upheld by an unseen force—the dark side. Among the covert operatives is ITEM, a four-member elite unit. With Rikou Takitsubo's tracking abilities, Frenda Seivelun's explosive expertise, Saiai Kinuhata's impenetrable defense, and Shizuri Mugino's overwhelming power as one of Academy City's seven Level 5 espers, they navigate the city's underbelly, taking on secret missions that never make the headlines.

As their latest assignment unfolds, the team moves with precision, unaware that their actions are setting the stage for a tragedy that will test their bonds of trust, friendship, and survival in the unforgiving darkness of Academy City.

(Source: MAL News)

titles.title: The Kept Man of the Princess Knight
He Is a Kept Man for Princess Knight.

data.title: Himekishi-sama no Himo
data.title_english: He Is a Kept Man for Princess Knight.
title_synonyms: The Kept Man of the Princess Knight
data.synopsis:
The Dungeon City is a wicked place filled with crime, debauchery, and death. Its one shining light is Arwin, the beautiful Crimson Princess Knight. She and her brave party of adventurers descend into the dungeon at the city's center, seeking a legendary treasure with the power to rebuild the princess's fallen kingdom. Many yearn to be by her side, but that spot is already taken by Matthew, a man despised by all in town as a cowardly weakling. Everyone thinks he is scum who just spends her hard-earned money on booze, women, and gambling. No one in the city—not even the princess knight— knows what Matthew is truly capable of.

(Source: Yen Press)

data.title: Yesu
data.synopsis:
Covers the life of Jesus' birth to resurrection and ascension, centered on the Gospels.

(Source: KMDb)

data.title: Wanghu Esther
data.synopsis:
2,500 years ago, the Jewish people were under the rule of the powerful Medo-Persia. Many Jews settled in this country and lived freely believing in their God, Jehovah, with the permission of King Ahasuerus. Mordecai, a virtuous Jew who worked at the palace gate, had a pretty cousin named Esther who had lost her parents at an early age. Esther, who had a gentle and wise personality, later became the queen of the great empire of Medo-Persia. Meanwhile, Haman, who had a cruel personality, plotted with the king that Mordecai was disobeying the king's law and committing anti-national acts, and the king, enraged, ordered all the Jews to be killed. Queen Esther risked her life to save her people.

(Source: KMDb)
